source: lang2vec (Littell et al. 2017) URIEL phonology_knn features, cosine distance from English
comparison: Lauscher et al. (2020) report PHON similarity as the strongest NER predictor (Pearson r=0.78, Spearman r=0.86, mBERT, WikiANN); this is a phonological DISTANCE metric, so a replicating result would show a comparably large NEGATIVE r
